languages.text: [Бросить взгляд на хроно] "В следующий раз постарайся осознать, что я всегда прав{mf||а}, быстрее".
[Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."
languages.original_text: [Бросить взгляд на хроно] "В следующий раз постарайся осознать, что я всегда прав{mf||а}, быстрее".

traits.locale_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."
[Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."
[Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

languages.text: [Consultar el crono] «La próxima vez, intente tardar menos en entender que siempre tengo razón».
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

traits.locale_text: [Consultar el crono] «La próxima vez, intente tardar menos en entender que siempre tengo razón».

languages.text: 【瞥一眼计时器】“下次，早点认清‘我永远是对的’这个事实。”
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

traits.locale_text: 【瞥一眼计时器】“下次，早点认清‘我永远是对的’这个事实。”

languages.text: [Regarder le chrono] « La prochaine fois, tâchez de réaliser plus rapidement que j'ai toujours raison. »
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

traits.locale_text: [Regarder le chrono] « La prochaine fois, tâchez de réaliser plus rapidement que j'ai toujours raison. »

languages.text: [Kronoya göz at] "Bir dahakine daima haklı olduğumu daha çabuk fark etmeye çalış."
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

traits.locale_text: [Kronoya göz at] "Bir dahakine daima haklı olduğumu daha çabuk fark etmeye çalış."

languages.text: [Einen Blick auf das Chrono werfen] "Seht zu, dass Ihr beim nächsten Mal schneller erkennt, dass ich immer recht habe."
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."

traits.locale_text: [Einen Blick auf das Chrono werfen] "Seht zu, dass Ihr beim nächsten Mal schneller erkennt, dass ich immer recht habe."

languages.text: [クロノをチラッと見て]、"次回は、私が常に正しいということに早く気づくようにしよう"。
languages.original_text: [Glance at the chrono] "Next time, try to be quicker about realising that I am always right."
